commit_scope: Extend the channel lens value example into a root-ontology matrix over six documented gematria roots.

commands: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/grammars/gematria.fk form-stdlib/channel.fk form-stdlib/gematria-channel.fk form-stdlib/tests/channel-root-ontology-lens-band.fk

cd form && ./validate.sh --binary form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/grammars/gematria.fk form-stdlib/channel.fk form-stdlib/gematria-channel.fk form-stdlib/tests/channel-root-ontology-lens-band.fk
local_validation.summary: channel-root-ontology-lens-band.fk extends the single ahava example into a root ontology matrix over love, unity, life, peace/wholeness, light, and mystery. Each row carries a source-attributed phonemic-energetic lens offer, documented gematria value/address, expansion or self-root class, JSON report row, and channel sensing receipt. Source and binary sibling kernels both return 111111, preserving the bridges love<->unity and light<->mystery as observable value and expansion.

phase_gate.reason: Local root-ontology matrix proof is complete; CI remains pending until the PR branch is pushed.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The channel lens now has an executable root-ontology matrix that can repeat the same value-observation shape across multiple core words and preserve expansion bridges as attributed evidence.
public_endpoints: Form channel root ontology matrix proof
test_flows: Read six documented gematria roots with expected values.
Verify each root's expected expansion or self-root class.
Parse a JSON root-ontology matrix report.
Send one source-attributed lens offer and one sensing receipt per root through CHANNEL-MSG.
Preserve love<->unity and light<->mystery as observed learning bridges.
